Name: Delft Hyperloop
Description:
For years now, the transportation industry has consisted of four modes of transportation. Society has settled on cars, trains, boats, and airplanes. In 2013, a new conceptual high-speed transportation system was introduced using near-vacuum tubes in which pressurized vehicles travel: the Hyperloop. Due to low air resistance in the tubes, the vehicles can travel at speeds of over 1000 km/h, almost the speed of sound.

Delft Hyperloop IX (DH09) is a team of 43 students from Delft University of Technology, on a mission to develop the desire, technology, and infrastructure for the future implementation of the Hyperloop system. We believe that the Hyperloop, a concept that is as fast as an airplane but has a fraction of the ecological footprint, will be the fifth mode of transportation and the future of long-distance traveling.

We, as a team, will build upon years of successful experience and multiple great performances in the SpaceX Hyperloop Pod Competition and the European Hyperloop Week (EHW). This year, we will be co-organizing and participating in EHW 2025, set to take place in Groningen and Veendam in July 2025.

Follow DH09 on LinkedIn to see our journey and watch us achieve our goals!

Description:
Chauffeursbedrijf

D&B The Mobility Group is toonaangevend in de mobiliteitsbranche. Op een effectieve en eigentijdse manier bieden wij optimale service gericht op partnership met onze klanten. Zo hebben wij al 15 jaar ervaring op het gebied van student chauffeur diensten en verzorgen wij valet parking services & shuttle services.

Student chauffeur diensten

Wanneer u gebruikt maakt van de student chauffeur diensten van D&B The Mobility Group wordt reistijd efficiënt besteed en kan deze omgezet worden in werktijd. Omdat situaties en wensen nu eenmaal verschillen, biedt D&B The Mobility Group chauffeursdiensten verschillende mogelijkheden.

Valet parking services

D&B Valet parking service is de oplossing voor uw parkeerprobleem in drukke steden of een perfecte eerste indruk voor uw gasten op een feestje of receptie. Bij aankomst worden uw gasten vriendelijk ontvangen door een student chauffeur van D&B: de autodeuren worden geopend en een keurige dame of heer begeleidt hen naar de ingang, indien nodig met paraplu. Ondertussen parkeert een student chauffeur de auto.

Name: Stichting Westpoort Bereikbaar
Description:
tichting Westpoort Bereikbaar is een stichting opgericht door Port of Amsterdam en ORAM en zij houdt zich bezig met mobiliteit & vervoersoplossingen in het Westpoort gebied.

Openbaar vervoer is belangrijk voor de leefbaarheid van de stad en de regio. Ook in gebieden die minder goed ontsloten zijn is dat belangrijk. Als een normale ov-lijn hierin niet voorziet kan aanvullend openbaar vervoer een uitkomst bieden. Sinds een aantal jaar ontwikkelt GVB Commercieel Vervoer deze dienstverlening en werkt hiervoor samen met private partijen. Deze partijen financieren de buslijnen, maar GVB Commercieel Vervoer rijdt ze.

Westpoortbus Aanvullend Openbaar Vervoer is een initiatief van de Stichting Westpoort Bereikbaar en wordt in samenwerking met GVB Commercieel vervoer geëxploiteerd.

In het Amsterdamse Havengebied moet aanvullend openbaar vervoer een uitkomst bieden voor de medewerkers en bezoekers. Voorheen moesten zij met eigen vervoer komen. De Westpoort bus is een uniek collectief concept dat wordt bekostigd door de deelnemende bedrijven in het Amsterdamse Westelijk Havengebied. Sinds Oktober 2021 zijn er twee buslijnen die het Westpoort gebied ontsluiten voor medewerkers en bezoekers van de bedrijven in die regio.

Name: Flee Logistics - NEMT Provider
Description:
Comprehensive Non-Emergency Medical Transport Solutions

At Flee Logistics, we specialize in providing top-notch non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) services to meet a wide range of mobility needs. Our mission is to ensure safe, reliable, and comfortable transport for individuals requiring specialized care during their journeys. Our services include:

Ambulatory Medical Transport: We offer transport services for patients who can walk but need assistance or supervision during their travels to medical appointments, therapy sessions, or any other non-emergency destinations.

Name: Capstone Transportation
Description:
Since December of 2015, the independent operating affiliates of Capstone Transportation have provided communities with compassionate, non-emergency and emergency transportation. We foster an entrepreneurial culture of ownership coupled with a field-driven, flat structure, which empowers local leaders and their teams to provide superior solutions to the specific transportation needs of the communities they serve.*

While Capstone Transportation was formed in December 2015, the story really begins in 1999 when The Ensign Group (ENSG) was formed. Since 1999, the independent operating affiliates of The Ensign Group have provided communities with compassionate, post-acute care. Each of the 250+ business are run independently by over 28,000 employees.

Our affiliated entities offer a broad spectrum of post-acute care including assisted living, skilled nursing, transportation, mobile radiology, respiratory services and rehabilitative care. We believe we exist to dignify and transform the sectors we operate within. Our core values of celebration, accountability, passion for learning, love one another, intelligent risk taking, customer second, and ownership guide us in our decision making and inspire us to be better people, in and out of work.

In recent years, Capstone Transportation has expanded our operations. Our affiliated entities are located across four states, and we are continuing to grow. With that growth, we are innovating and designing best-practice solutions to lower the cost and improve the quality of our services. We partner with many other healthcare organizations across our service area with the goal of ensuring our clients are receiving the best possible service.

Name: Antalya Havalimanı Transfer
Description:
Antalya Havalimanı Transfer hizmetleri arasında öne çıkan Kullar Transfer, sizlere Antalya'nın gözde destinasyonlarına ulaşımınızda eşsiz bir konfor ve güvenlik sunar. Profesyonel ve deneyimli şoförlerimizle Antalya Havalimanı'ndan Lara, Kemer, Belek gibi turistik bölgelere sorunsuz bir şekilde ulaşmanızı sağlıyoruz. İster bireysel ister grup halinde seyahat edin, Kullar Transfer olarak her türlü ihtiyaca uygun modern ve lüks araçlarımızla hizmetinizdeyiz.

Antalya Havalimanı'ndan başlayarak, tatilinizin ilk anından itibaren kaliteli ve güvenli bir transfer deneyimi yaşamanız için buradayız. Transfer ihtiyaçlarınızı en iyi şekilde karşılamak üzere tasarlanmış hizmetlerimiz, müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeyde tutmayı hedefler. Kullar Transfer ile yapacağınız yolculuklar, konfor ve rahatlık açısından standartların ötesine geçer.

Tatiliniz sırasında zamanınızın kıymetli olduğunu biliyoruz. Bu nedenle, Antalya Havalimanı transfer süreçlerinizde hiçbir zaman kaybı yaşamamanız için tüm detayları özenle planlıyoruz. Havalimanında karşılamadan, otelinize veya diğer istediğiniz lokasyonlara ulaşımınıza kadar her adımı titizlikle organize ediyoruz. Kullar Transfer, rezervasyon sürecinden başlayarak yolculuğunuzun sonuna kadar sizlere eşlik eden bir partnerdir.

Antalya'nın turistik ve büyüleyici atmosferini keşfetmeye havalimanından başlayarak, Kullar Transfer ile güven içinde ve konforlu bir şekilde ulaşımınızı gerçekleştirin. Biz, her bir müşterimizin memnuniyetini ve rahatını sağlamak için buradayız. Kullar Transfer, Antalya Havalimanı'ndan başlayan yolculuklarınızda kaliteli hizmet anlayışıyla daima yanınızda.

Antalya Havalimanı transfer hizmetlerinde bir numara olan Kullar Transfer, seyahat deneyiminizi unutulmaz kılmak için çalışmalarına devam ediyor. Siz de Antalya'ya geldiğinizde, güvenilir ve konforlu bir transfer deneyimi için Kullar Transfer'i tercih edin ve tatilinize mükemmel bir başlangıç yapın!

Name: Arriva Touring
Description:
Arriva Touring is specialist in de verhuur van bussen en touringcars. Modern wagenpark met alleen Euro VI motoren (schoonste uitstoot). Van 19, 38, 50, 60 personen tot dubbeldekker voor 86 personen, we hebben het allemaal voor u. Dus wilt u een touringcar huren in Groningen, Friesland of Drenthe, vul dan het offerte formulier in of bel ons voor de mogelijkheden. Ons kantoor is gevestigd in Groningen en Maastricht. Met vestigingen in Leeuwarden, Heerenveen en Sneek kunnen we u tevens in Fryslân van dienst zijn, sinds april 2020 verzorgen wij ook het vervoer op Amsterdam Airport Schiphol. 

Wij kiezen voor kwaliteit, in materieel en personeel. Wij zijn ISO 9001:2015 en ISO 14001/27001 gecertificeerd, staan op trede 3 van de PSO ladder (prestatie-ladder sociaal ondernemen), en trede 4 (van 5) op de CO2 – Prestatieladder wat u onder andere garanties geeft over veiligheid, comfort, naleving van de rij- en rusttijden en milieuprestaties. Daarnaast zijn de touringcars uitstekend onderhouden. De veiligheid van onze passagiers staat uiteraard boven alles. Zo reist u comfortabel en veilig naar uw bestemming. Voor iedere aanvraag hebben wij passend vervoer beschikbaar. Op verzoek kunnen wij ook met HVO brandstof in onze bussen rijden, met maar liefst 90% minder CO2 uitstoot. Omdat u kunt aantonen dat er zelfs op vervoersgebied op duurzaamheid wordt gelet, is deze HVO brandstof ook voor uw organisatie interessant!

Today, CTT proudly serves over 200 satisfied clients. We recognize our social responsibility and offer free driver training programs across all sectors to promote higher safety standards and service excellence.

U hoeft zich geen zorgen te maken over waar u vertrekt of landt, zelfs niet als uw bestemmingen binnen één reis veranderen. PARKED staat klaar om uw auto met de grootste zorg te parkeren en te onderhouden.

Onze dienstverlening strekt zich uit over verschillende luchthavens, waardoor wij een unieke service bieden die aansluit bij de moderne, flexibele reiziger. Of u nu voor zaken reist of op vakantie gaat, PARKED zorgt ervoor dat uw auto veilig, beveiligd en in topconditie bewaard wordt. Dit alles terwijl u zich concentreert op wat echt belangrijk is: het verkennen van de wereld.

PARKED biedt niet alleen gemak, maar ook gemoedsrust. Ons team van professionele valets zorgt voor een soepele overdracht van uw voertuig bij elke luchthaven. Met onze betrouwbare service kunt u erop vertrouwen dat uw auto in goede handen is, ongeacht uw reisplannen.

Wij verwelkomen u bij PARKED, waar elke reis begint en eindigt met comfort en gemoedsrust. Laat ons de zorg voor uw auto overnemen, zodat u zich kunt concentreren op het genieten van uw reis. PARKED - uw partner in reiscomfort, waar uw reis ook naartoe gaat.

Sinds 2008 actief in de wereld van valet parking met Euro BOB en sinds 2023 onder een eigen naam.

Given our positive client reviews, it's time to say yes to a sustainable way of travel with e-Wave Green Airport Transfers.

Name: Pupil School Bus Ltd.
Description:
Pupil- school bus Ltd. service is a transportation service that provides safe and convenient transportation for students to and from school. Our school bus services are typically contracted by schools to provide transportation services for their students, but we may also be used by parents who want a reliable and safe transportation option for their children.

One of the key benefits of our school bus service is safety. Our school bus services typically have strict safety regulations and guidelines in place to ensure that students are transported safely to and from school. Drivers and female guide are typically highly trained and have extensive experience working with children, so they are equipped to handle any situation that may arise during transportation.

In addition to safety, our school bus services also offer convenience. Our school bus services typically offer door-to-door transportation, which means that students are picked up and dropped off at their front door. This can be especially beneficial for parents who have busy schedules and are unable to transport their children to and from school themselves.

Our buses are equipped with comfortable seating, air conditioning, GPS tracking system, CCTV connected and SMS notification system to ensure the safety of your children.

Another benefit of our school bus service is reliability. Our school bus services typically have strict schedules in place, so parents and students can rest assured that they will arrive at school and home on time. Additionally, our school bus services typically have backup plans in place in case of unforeseen circumstances, such as traffic or inclement weather.

Overall, our school bus service is a valuable service for parents and students who prioritize safety, convenience, and reliability when it comes to transportation to and from school.

1982 yılında başladığımız personel taşımacılığı alanına, günümüze gelene kadar, yenilikçi yaklaşımdan ayrılmadan, sektörün ve müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarını çağın gereklilikleriyle yerine getirmeye çalışan anlayışımızla yolumuza emin adımlarla devam etmekteyiz. 

Eskişehir merkezinde bulunan firmamız, gün geçtikçe araç filolarını hem artırarak hem de yenileyerek özellikle üretim ve kamu sektöründeki müşterilerine güvenli, konforlu ve zamanında ulaşım hizmeti vermektedir. D2 yetki belgesiyle birlikte, turizm sektöründe faaliyet gösteren iş ortaklarına araç kiralama hizmetlerine devam etmekte, güvenli ve konforlu ulaşımın keyfini müşterilerine hissettirmektedir. 

Turgut Seyahat ailesi olarak 30’dan fazla çalışana istihdam sağlayarak, personelin kişisel gelişimleriyle yakından ilgilenmekteyiz. Bu çerçevede sektöre yetkin ve güler yüzlü personel kazandırma faaliyetlerini sürdürmekle birlikte, çalışanlarımıza sektörde yeni iş fırsatlarından kolayca yararlanma fırsatları sunmaktayız. 

Firmamızı sektöründe en iyi ve en yenilikçi olma yolunda geliştirmek için tüm gücümüzle çalışmalarımıza devam ediyoruz.
Primary Industry: Shuttles and Special Needs Transportation Services

Name: NLS France
Description:
Hello, 

I have created NLS France (Vehicles and Transportation with driver Company) in 2014.
My Company is registered in Cannes, French Riviera and has a fleet of 6 cars of the premium class, mainly Mercedes. 

The Company offers deliveries and transportation in the French Riviera region, between Monaco and St Tropez, and also can provide service of transportation in Europe.

My priority is the premium class transportation of the customers and the high quality of service for an affordable price.

NLS France offers:

     - Transportation and vehicles
• by professional drivers (male and female) dressed business style, with a good knowledge of English
• all drivers have signed the Confidentiality clauses
• all our vehicles are in the ideal condition and always clean and pleasant for our customers
• Water, candies and hand gel are always provided on route to make our customers feel comfortable
• Smartphones chargers are available 
• WI-Fi during the ride is complimentary
• A big variety of easy-listening, classic or relaxing music is ready on-board
• Baby chair is optional if needed (complimentary for our guests)

NLS France has an option to be hired for long-time Projects and has already experienced this kind of service :

• with « VODAFONE » (KANZAMAN Productions-Monaco-April  2016) staff transportation of a commercial video 
• VIP transportation of the actors of an Indian movie « BEFIKRE » (FIRSTEP Productions-Paris-May 2016)
• Transportation Project with CARTIER (July 2016)
• Transportation Project with DIOR (May 2016)
• Transportation Project with JAEGER-LECOULTRE (May 2016)

NLS France also has a pleasure to work with the Tourist, Event Management and Real Estate Agencies to organize transportation for their customers.

Entrusting your customers to NLS France you are guaranteed by a premium and quality service.

I remain at your disposal for any further information.
Owner and Founder of NLS France
Nicolas Colinet

Description:

Şti. firmamız 1996 yılında "Personel ve öğrenci servis taşımacılığı" alanında çıktığı istikrarlı ve başarılı dolu yolda servis taşımacılığının yanı sıra, bugün 400'ü aşkın araç filosu ile araç kiralama ve sevkiyat dağıtım hizmetini deneyimli ve uzman kadrosu ile birlikte kaliteli ve güvenli hizmeti müşterilerine sunmanın onuru ve gururunu yaşamanın sevinci içerisindedir.

Kopuz Turizm ; sektörde ilerici firma olarak, TÜRKAK onaylı ISO-9001:2000 ve TSE belgeli olup tüm standartlara uygun, hizmet kalitesinin yüksek olduğu bir firmadır. Taşımasını yaptığımız tüm servis yolcularımız Ferdi Kaza Sigortası güvencesi altındadır. Araç personellerimiz Pisko-Teknik, SRC ve ileri sürüş tekniği eğitimlerinden geçirilmiş olup tüm belgeleri mevcuttur.

Araçlarımızın hepsinin rutin kontrolleri ve bakımları düzenli olarak takip edilmekte, olası risklere karşı önlemleri alınmaktadır. Ayrıca firmamıza hizmet veren tüm araçların trafik sigortası, kasko ve ferdi kaza sigortası poliçeleri tarafımızdan tamamlanmakta ve takip altında tutulmaktadır. Mevcut araç filomuz ; 4 kişilik binek sınıfı ve 55 kişilik otobüs sınıfları arasında değişkenlik gösterip tüm araçlardan oluşmaktadır.

Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına cevap verebilmek için sürekli piyasa araştırmasını yapan ekiplerimiz müşterilerimizin istek ve beklentileri doğrultusunda çözümleri bizlere ulaştırmakta bizler de müşteri haklarını tarafsız ve adilane bir şekilde yürütmekte ve bunu da görevlerimizin en başında tutmaktayız.

Bir firmanın çalışmakta olduğu veya çalışacağı tüm tedarikçilerdeki beklentisi; güven, kalite, yeterlilik, taleplere anında ve kolay çözümler sunabilmek ve zamanı iyi değerlendirme becerisine sahip firmalar ile çalışmaktadır.

İşte tüm bu özelliklerin adres KOPUZ TURİZM' dir. Firmamız var olduğu sürece "Yaşama ve insana saygılı hizmeti devam ettirmeyi kendine prensip edinmiştir."

Name: Saméo Transport Spécialisé
Description:
Bienvenue chez Saméo Transport Spécialisé !

Nous sommes une société de transport unique et bienveillante, dédiée à l'accompagnement de personnes ayant des besoins spécifiques. Notre objectif est de fournir un environnement chaleureux et sécurisé, offrant non seulement un transport fiable, mais aussi une présence attentionnée et personnalisée pour nos clients et leur entourage.

Nous savons à quel point il peut être difficile pour les personnes accompagnées de se déplacer, que ce soit pour des rendez-vous médicaux, des courses ou simplement pour visiter leur famille et leurs amis. C'est pourquoi nous avons créé une entreprise mettant l'accent sur le confort, la sécurité et le professionnalisme.

Nos chauffeurs expérimentés et courtois sont là pour aider nos voyageurs à se déplacer en toute sécurité et tranquillité d'esprit. Nous offrons des options de transport personnalisées en fonction des besoins de chaque usager, y compris des services de transport individuels ou en groupe.

Nous sommes fiers de proposer des véhicules spacieux et confortables, équipés pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques de nos clients, y compris les fauteuils roulants et les déambulateurs. Tous nos véhicules sont régulièrement entretenus et inspectés pour assurer la sécurité et le confort de nos bénéficiaires.

Nous nous engageons à offrir des services de qualité supérieure à des prix compétitifs, avec des tarifs clairs et transparents adaptés aux divers besoins.

Chez Saméo, nous aspirons à être bien plus qu'une entreprise de transport. Nous voulons être un véritable pilier de soutien pour notre communauté, en montrant que l'amitié et le professionnalisme peuvent conduire à de grandes réalisations.

Ensemble, construisons un avenir meilleur pour tous.

We offer modern vehicules adapted and equipped with first in class technology and certified equipment for a comfortable and safe transportation for people with a disability or that need assitence during their transportation. All our vehicles are wheelchair accessible and have ADAS intelligent systems that control everything that happens inside and outside de vehicle, we transmit in real time the full trip to family or friends, so they can always see everything that happens during the trip of their family member.
We are initiating operation in Puebla, México and have a 5 year expansion plan in the country and looking also for expansion outside México.
We dream that through our services, one day, people with limited mobility or a disability will recover authonomy and independence movement and are able  to go everywhere and anytime in a safe and comfortable Safe Mobility vehicle.

Description:
Excellent TransCare (ETC) is a New Jersey-based transportation and support services provider delivering compassionate, reliable, and client-centered mobility solutions.

As a division of Specialty Logistics Management LLC, we are committed to helping individuals and families live fully and independently, offering door-to-door support through Medicaid-funded services, private transportation, and specialized care mobility.

From long-distance hospital discharges to local youth and day program transportation, our team is driven by purpose and defined by care.

Our core services include:

* Medical Transportation
* Wheelchair and ambulatory trips
* Dialysis, post-op, behavioral health, and recovery transport
* Hospital discharges and therapy appointments
* DDD-Approved Support Services
* Individual Supports
* Community-Based Supports
* Respite and Support Coordination Collaboration
* Student and Youth Transportation
* Job training and after-school programs
* Teen treatment and youth development centers
* Vocational and transitional services
* Private and Event Transport
* Weddings, funerals, and family events
* Airport, cruise port, and train station transfers
* Night outs and group travel
* Corporate travel and event shuttles

What sets us apart:

* CPR, First Aid, and Defensive Driving certified drivers
* Real-time vehicle tracking and 24/7 admin support
* Clean, late-model vehicles with in-house maintenance
* Client-first scheduling tools and responsive communication
* Fully insured and contract-ready for public and private programs

Learn more at www.etranscare.com

Name: Americ Transit Services, LLC
Description:
Americ Transit Services, LLC is a reputable Non-Medical Transportation Company based in the Atlanta Metropolitan area. With our certifications as a Disadvantaged Business Enterprise (DBE) and Minority Business Enterprise (MBE), we are committed to fostering diversity and equal opportunities within the industry.

Our primary focus is on providing reliable and specialized transportation services for individuals with mobility challenges. We offer wheelchair and stretcher services, catering to various locations such as Private Residences, Assisted Living Facilities, Nursing Homes, Hospitals, Senior Medical Centers, and more.

At Americ Transit Services, we understand the importance of timely and comfortable transportation to medical and healthcare appointments. With a team of trained and compassionate drivers, we ensure that each passenger receives the highest level of care and attention throughout their journey. Our drivers are experienced in handling medical equipment and are committed to maintaining a safe and comfortable environment for all passengers.

As a non-medical transportation provider, we take pride in our ability to connect individuals with the essential healthcare services they require. Whether it's a routine check-up or ongoing treatment, we strive to make each trip as convenient and stress-free as possible.

Choose Americ Transit Services, LLC for your non-medical transportation needs in the Atlanta Metropolitan area. Name: Gadabout Transportation Services, Inc.
Description:
Gadabout Transportation Services, Inc. offers affordable transportation solutions tailored to the needs of Tompkins County residents aged 55 and above, as well as those who are ADA (American Disability Act) certified. Our mission is to ensure convenient and accessible transportation options for seniors and individuals with disabilities, enhancing their mobility and overall quality of life. Connect with us to learn more about how we're making a positive impact on our community through reliable and inclusive transportation services.

Gadabout office hours are Monday through Friday, 8:00am to 4:30pm
Phone (607) 273-1878 
Email: Gadaboutgroup@tcatmail.com

To request a ride, you will need to schedule your ride two (2) business days before you need a ride if you are not ADA certified. Non-ADA riders can ride Monday through Friday, there is no weekend service for Non-ADA transportation. 

Call (607) 273-1878 or email gadaboutgroup@tcatmail.com between 8 am and 4:30 pm, (not including weekends and holidays).

Gadabout Tickets:
· Zone #1 is $2.00 a Ticket or $20.00 for 1 book of Ten (10) tickets
· Zone #2 is $3.00 a Ticket or $15.00 for 1 book of Five (5) tickets
You may call our office to purchase tickets. We will deliver them to you via the driver. You then pay the driver for your tickets. We take cash or checks only. No debit or credit cards currently. 

Additional riders are allowed, but they will have to pay for each ride. However, riders certified as PCA (Certified Personal Care Assistant) do not have to pay.

If you are disabled, you can apply for ADA, a federal program available through TCAT to aid people of any age with transportation if they have a disability that prevents them from driving or riding other modes of transportation.

· Contact Jen at TCAT (607) 277-9388 Ext. 420 to apply

If you qualify for ADA, you can ride every day of the week during TCAT hours for your area. Also, you only need to call the day before you need a ride.

Name: Facilitating Access to Coordinated Transportation (FACT)
Description:
Full Access and Coordinated Transportation, Inc. (FACT), is a nonprofit agency formed in 2005, to improve access to transportation for seniors, persons with disabilities, veterans and the income disadvantaged and fill gaps in existing services. In 2006 SANDAG designated FACT the Consolidated Transportation Services Agency (CTSA) for San Diego County. 

There are numerous individuals/communities in San Diego County that are unable to access public transportation either due to their special needs, the distance from transit routes, or due to lack of services. FACT acts as a mobility manager for individuals who are looking for transportation by referring them to the most appropriate mode for them. Transportation referrals are provided in person, via telephone, and through the web based trip planner. 

If there is no suitable and affordable transportation available, you may qualify to ride with RideFACT. RideFACT is a low cost dial-a-ride for individuals who have no other transportation options operated by FACT. RideFACT is available countywide for any trip purpose. 

FACT Services:

       1. Transportation information and services - 888-924-3228
       2. Web based information - www.factsd.org 
       3. Transportation Brokerage
                  - RideFACT: Dial-A-Ride for seniors and persons with disabilities
                  - Contracted transportation
                  - RideFACTNow: On-demand wheelchair accessible vehicle (WAV) service 

 Mission:

Assist San Diego County residents with barriers to mobility to achieve independence through coordination of transportation services.

Name: Spectrum Drive
Description:
Spectrum Drive is a specialist transport provider based in the West Midlands focused on delivering high-quality, safe and reliable travel services for children and young people with Special Educational Needs (SEN), vulnerable adults, and the wider community. While we operate as a licensed private hire transport provider, our primary positioning is community-first, placing inclusive and supportive travel at the centre of our model.
Our mission is to remove transport barriers for families and individuals who require a more empathetic, structured and understanding travel service. With first-hand experience of autism and neurodiversity within the leadership of the company, Spectrum Drive is uniquely positioned to deliver transport that is both professional and deeply informed by lived experience.

we believe transport should be more than just getting from A to B — it should be safe, comfortable, and inclusive for all. We’re passionate about helping people stay connected, independent, and supported through reliable transport solutions.
We aim to build a strong partnerships with councils, schools, and organisations to deliver accessible, safe, and professional transport for every individual.

Our vision is to become a trusted name in inclusive transport — blending care, reliability, and innovation in everything we do.

Name: DEBeachRides.com by William K Congdon
Description:
William K Congdon – Bill a Delaware Beach veteran, provides Airport Transportation – business or pleasure. door to door, resident or visitor. Home pickup service in Lewes, Rehoboth Beach, Dewey, Bethany, Long Neck, Milton, Georgetown and others in Sussex County.
 
We'll get you, coming or going: pick up or drop off. Airport Shuttles - PHL - Philadelphia, BWI - Baltimore Washington, IAD - Dulles, DCA - Reagan, SBY - Salisbury, GED - Georgetown & ILG - Wilmington Airports. We also drive to area Amtrak Stations including Wilmington, Baltimore and Washington DC.

We even do the area's bus depots, cruise liner ports of call, Lewes Ferry Terminals, colleges, universities, military bases, VA Hospitals and will even take you out of state, just to visit friends or family. 

Just need a ride to the beach? I'll get you here. Don't fight the weekend traffic, relax, have a drink and enjoy the ride down here. Bill will pick you up at home or work any day, any time you want - he makes it convenient to you.

Our clients are residents and vacationers in Sussex County, at the Delaware Beaches. So start your next business trip or vacation on the right foot and let us get you where you need to be. Whether you plan to travel by plane, train, bus, or ship. Don't burden your family or friends to drive you in the wee hours of the morning or pick you up in the middle of the night. 

We work on your schedule, ensuring you have enough time to avoid construction delays or traffic jams. We provide a stress-free experience so you can relax and enjoy the view, and we'll get you to your destination on-time. There's no need to be rushing around, worrying if the police will be pulling you over. 

Bill caters to your needs, we'll wait for you, carry your bags, make extra stops, and provides drinks/snacks for long distance rides. 

If you want friendly, on-time service and a safe ride see DEBeachRides - schedule your ride online, call or text us.

Name: PTS TURİZM
Description:
1984 yılında başlayan turizm sektöründeki girişimlerimizde dijital dünyanın hayatımıza olan etkilerini gözlemleyerek PTS temellerini 2019 yılında attık. 2019 yılında PTS’nin ilk olarak İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir, Muğla, Antalya şehirleri başta olmak üzere tüm Türkiye’de ulaşımın kolaylığı ile tanıştırıyor ve buluşturuyoruz. Transfer taleplerinizi yönetmenin ve hızlı rezervasyon yapmanın kolaylığını PTS ile yaşamanızı istiyoruz. Güvenlik, kalite ve profesyonel hizmet anlayışını ön planda tutarak seyahatlerinizde transfer taleplerinizi gerçekleştirmekteyiz.

Bireysel, kurumsal, organizasyon ve şehirler arası ulaşımlarınızda bizi tercih edebilirsiniz. Kurumsal talepler için geliştirdiğimiz turizm sektöründe ilk defa kullanılan B2B yazılımımız ile talepleri tarafımıza iletebilir ve süreçi takip edebilirsiniz. Ayrıca entegrasyon imkanı sunuyorsanız kullandığınız CRM altyapısına entegre olarak kendi sisteminizden gönderdiğiniz taleplerinizi direk sistemize alarak PTS içerisinde süreçlerini başlatabilirsiniz.

OPERASYON

Tamamen kendi operasyon yapımıza uygun olarak tasarladığımız PTS Otomasyon yazılımımız ile transfer operasyonlarında ve Kongre Mice operasyonlarında birimler arasındaki veri akışının hızlı, sorunsuz ve kayıt altında gerçekleşmesini sağlamakta, dolayısı ile operasyon sürecinin de problemsiz sonlanmasına imkan vermekteyiz.

REZERVASYON VE ARAÇLAR

Operasyon hazırlık aşaması ve operasyon süresince 7/24 e-mail vasıtası ile online ortamda yazılı olarak taleplerinizi iletebilir ve gerçekleştirebilirsiniz. Programın geçmiş takibi ve sağlıklı ilerleyişi açısından siz çözüm ortaklarımız için önem verdiğimiz bir uygulamadır.

Tamamı şirketimize ait otomobilden otobüse geniş, genç ve dikkat çekici araç ﬁlomuz ve deneyimli sürücülerimiz ile sektörde fark yaratmaktayız.

Name: AMP Transportation Management, LLC
Description:
AMP Transportation Management, LLC was founded in September 2022 by Miguel de la Cruz. Our journey began with a casual conversation among industry-experienced friends and family, where we identified the industry's potential for improvement. Recognizing the lack of quality service providers and the community's needs, we set out to deliver exceptional customer service—a vital aspect often overlooked by other Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT) providers.

At AMP Transportation Management, we understand the importance of timely and comfortable transportation to medical appointments. Our team comprises professionals with extensive backgrounds in NEMT services, customer service, operational leadership, strategic planning, and more. With their collective knowledge and experience, we deliver superior care and service to our beloved community.

What sets us apart is our commitment to revolutionizing the NEMT market by offering a high-quality service that meets and exceeds expectations. We utilize modern vehicles, employ trained drivers, and leverage advanced technology to deliver on-time and comfortable transportation. The safety and well-being of our customers and staff are paramount, which is why we strictly adhere to rigorous safety and hygiene protocols.

We have built a strong reputation and a loyal customer base in The Bronx and beyond. We take pride in the positive feedback and referrals we receive and the partnerships we have forged with medical facilities, insurance companies, and community organizations that trust and support our services.

To book a ride with us or learn more about our NEMT service, please visit our website at www.amptransports.com. Our customer services team is available Mondays through Fridays from 5:00 am to 5:00 pm to assist you with your transportation needs. Our office hours are 9:00 am to 5:00 pm. You can also reach us by calling (718) 400-1267 or emailing info@amptransports.com.

Thank you for taking the time to read our company

Name: ALC MÉDIC
Description:

Nous croyons que la mobilité des résidents et leur bien-être global sont essentiels pour préserver leur qualité de vie tout en simplifiant la gestion quotidienne des établissements.

Notre offre combinée :

1- Une solution de transport adaptée/médicale, pensée pour vos résidents à mobilité réduite, offrant une planification optimale, une disponibilité accrue et une fiabilité à toute épreuve.

Chaque trajet et chaque soin deviennent une expérience sûre et digne, permettant aux responsables de se concentrer sur ce qui compte : assurer des soins de qualité à leurs résidents.

Pourquoi nous choisir ?
ALC Médic est bien plus qu’un simple prestataire. 

Nous sommes un partenaire stratégique, offrant :
1- Une solution de transport qui réduit les imprévus, facilite l’organisation, et répond aux demandes, même en urgence.

2- Des soins spécialisés qui complètent nos services, pour offrir une approche globale de la santé et du bien-être.

Notre Mantra :
Améliorer la gestion et la mobilité des résidents tout en valorisant leur dignité, leur respect et leur santé à chaque étape.

Rejoignez-nous !
Ensemble, transformons la manière dont nous soutenons nos aînés et les personnes vulnérables, grâce à des solutions pratiques et humaines.

Şti. firmamız 1996 yılında "Personel ve öğrenci servis taşımacılığı" alanında çıktığı istikrarlı ve başarılı dolu yolda servis taşımacılığının yanı sıra, bugün 400'ü aşkın araç filosu ile araç kiralama ve sevkiyat dağıtım hizmetini deneyimli ve uzman kadrosu ile birlikte kaliteli ve güvenli hizmeti müşterilerine sunmanın onuru ve gururunu yaşamanın sevinci içerisindedir.

Kopuz Turizm ; sektörde ilerici firma olarak, TÜRKAK onaylı ISO-9001:2000 ve TSE belgeli olup tüm standartlara uygun, hizmet kalitesinin yüksek olduğu bir firmadır. Taşımasını yaptığımız tüm servis yolcularımız Ferdi Kaza Sigortası güvencesi altındadır. Araç personellerimiz Pisko-Teknik, SRC ve ileri sürüş tekniği eğitimlerinden geçirilmiş olup tüm belgeleri mevcuttur.

Araçlarımızın hepsinin rutin kontrolleri ve bakımları düzenli olarak takip edilmekte, olası risklere karşı önlemleri alınmaktadır. Ayrıca firmamıza hizmet veren tüm araçların trafik sigortası, kasko ve ferdi kaza sigortası poliçeleri tarafımızdan tamamlanmakta ve takip altında tutulmaktadır. Mevcut araç filomuz ; 4 kişilik binek sınıfı ve 55 kişilik otobüs sınıfları arasında değişkenlik gösterip tüm araçlardan oluşmaktadır.

Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına cevap verebilmek için sürekli piyasa araştırmasını yapan ekiplerimiz müşterilerimizin istek ve beklentileri doğrultusunda çözümleri bizlere ulaştırmakta bizler de müşteri haklarını tarafsız ve adilane bir şekilde yürütmekte ve bunu da görevlerimizin en başında tutmaktayız.

Bir firmanın çalışmakta olduğu veya çalışacağı tüm tedarikçilerdeki beklentisi; güven, kalite, yeterlilik, taleplere anında ve kolay çözümler sunabilmek ve zamanı iyi değerlendirme becerisine sahip firmalar ile çalışmaktadır.

İşte tüm bu özelliklerin adres KOPUZ TURİZM' dir. Firmamız var olduğu sürece "Yaşama ve insana saygılı hizmeti devam ettirmeyi kendine prensip edinmiştir."

Name: OYIBA
Description:
OYIBA was born from urgency. From a mother’s desperate plead for help. From a child lost — not because help wasn’t available, but because the system failed her.
Nataly’s story is the reason we exist.
She’s a mother who needed just one fair, fast ride to save her son’s life. But on that day, all she found was exploitation and delay. By the time she got home, it was too late.
We believe transportation should never be the reason someone loses a loved one, loses a job, misses a life changing interview, loses a life changing deal or misses an exam you’ve been preparing for a long time. That’s why OYIBA is built Rwanda’s smartest, most humane ride-hailing platform — one that puts people over profit, speed over stress, and dignity over desperation.
Through our easy-to-use mobile app, riders can:
•	 Book verified moto-taxi or car drivers instantly
•	 See fair, transparent pricing — no haggling, no exploitation
•	 Track rides in real-time and pay via Mobile Money
•	 Access trusted customer support that actually cares
And for drivers, OYIBA creates a dignified, tech-enabled way to earn more, work smarter, and serve their communities with pride.
We’re not just in tech.
We’re in the business of restoring trust, saving time, and more importantly changing lives.

 Only Smart People Know & Use OYIBA.

 Based in Kigali |  Rwandan-built | Ride-hailing for Moto & Car |  App Available on Android & iOS |  Built for Rwanda. Ready for Africa.

Taşımacılık : Zemzem Grup, güvenli ve konforlu taşımacılık hizmeti sunarak, hem yurtiçi hem de uluslararası ulaşım ihtiyaçlarına çözüm getirmektedir. Modern araç filosu ve deneyimli sürücü kadrosuyla, yolcuların güvenliğini ve konforunu ön planda tutarak taşımacılık hizmeti sağlamaktadır.

Otelcilik: Şirket, turizm sektöründe de aktif olup, kaliteli otelcilik hizmetleri sunmaktadır. Hem yerli hem de yabancı turistlere konforlu ve lüks konaklama deneyimi yaşatarak, sektörde kendine sağlam bir yer edinmiştir.

İnşaat: Zemzem Grup, inşaat sektöründe de önemli projelere imza atmaktadır. Konut, ticari yapılar ve altyapı projeleri ile kaliteli ve sürdürülebilir yapı çözümleri üretmektedir. İnşaat alanındaki uzmanlığıyla, müşterilerine güvenli ve estetik yapılar sunmaktadır.

Acenta: Zemzem Grup, seyahat acentacılığı hizmeti de vererek, bireysel ve kurumsal müşterilere tatil, iş seyahati gibi organizasyonlarda profesyonel hizmet sunmaktadır. Zengin tur paketleri ve özelleştirilmiş seyahat çözümleri ile müşteri memnuniyetini hedeflemektedir.

Zemzem Grup, bu dört alandaki faaliyetlerinde kalite, güven ve müşteri odaklılık prensiplerini benimseyerek, sektördeki başarılarını sürdürmektedir.

Name: Airport Corridor Transportation Association - ACTA
Description:

Founded in 1990, ACTA is a coalition of private sector businesses and public agencies. Together, we work to improve transportation efficiency in Pittsburgh’s Airport Corridor by supporting and implementing programs that expand travel options, foster economic development, reduce congestion, and improve air quality. 

ACTA plays a key role in providing critical information on specific construction projects and serves as a vital communication link regarding traffic maintenance and safety in work zones. Join us in making transportation safer, more efficient, and more sustainable for everyone in Pittsburgh's Airport Corridor.

Name: FedNor Transportation, LLC.
Description:
FedNor Non-Emergency Medical Transportation FedNor is dedicated to ensuring that everyone has access to the medical care they need, regardless of their transportation challenges. 
Understanding the importance of reliable transportation in navigating the healthcare system, FedNor offers specialized services designed to cater to individuals with varying mobility needs. This includes wheelchair transportation services, stretcher transportation, and ambulatory options, all aimed at providing safe, comfortable, and efficient travel to medical appointments and treatments
So, what is Non-Emergency Medical Transportation? In simple terms, it refers to transportation arranged for patients who need to get to and from healthcare facilities for appointments, treatments, or follow-up care but are not facing a medical emergency. Unlike ambulance services, which are equipped for urgent medical situations, FedNor focuses on transporting individuals who require assistance due to their health conditions or lack of personal transportation.
At FedNor, we recognize that not everyone can easily access healthcare. Our wheelchair transportation services cater to those who use wheelchairs, ensuring they have a safe and secure ride to their medical appointments. For individuals who require stretcher transportation, we provide specialized vehicles equipped to accommodate their needs, ensuring comfort during transit. Our ambulatory services are available for those who can walk but may need assistance or support getting to and from their appointments
By offering these diverse transportation options, FedNor is committed to breaking down barriers to healthcare access. 
We strive to make the trip to medical appointments as smooth and stress-free as possible, allowing patients to focus on their health and well-being. FedNor ensures that everyone can access the medical services they require, ultimately promoting better health outcomes and a healthier community for all.

Een wandeling door een natuurgebied kan meer dan eens onderbroken worden door water. In veel gevallen is er dan een bemande voetveer om toeristen naar de overkant te brengen, maar dat komt steeds minder voor. Ferry Plan speelt hier op in en brengt u naar de overkant. Ferry Easy.

Ferry Easy biedt uw passagiers (maximaal 12 voetgangers) een veilige en duurzame overtocht. Het minimalistische design van Ferry Easy, zorgt er tevens voor dat alleen noodzakelijke componenten op het voetveer aanwezig zijn. Hierdoor blijft Ferry Easy licht en dat bespaart weer energie. De stroom die Ferry Easy nodig heeft wordt opgewekt uit de zonnecellen op de overkapping. Daarnaast is Ferry Easy ook nog eens gemaakt van duurzaam aluminium. Aan wal staat aan iedere zijde een paal met een knop. De passagier drukt op de knop en Ferry Easy komt vanzelf naar de kant. De passagier stapt op het voetveer en vaart duurzaam en veilig naar de overkant. Volledig automatisch en zeer gemakkelijk.

Het ontwerp van Ferry Easy zorgt er voor dat het voetveer onderhouds- en vandalismevrij is. Een camera aan boord zorgt mede voor de veiligheid van de passagiers.

Name: Minitram Systems Ltd
Description:
Developed by Transport Design International (TDI), Minitram Systems seek to offer the system characteristics normally associated with light rail through the flexibility and cost effectiveness of automotive technology.

The vehicles are small scale and can travel along roadways with shared occupancy, dedicated alignments, through pedestrian areas and even indoors within shopping centres or other building complexes. 

Minitrams can be offered in two modes: either for running on shallow-laid tram track, or on rubber tyres using Safeguide concealed wire guidance technology.

Wij maken het verschil door een vaste chauffeur te bieden tegen een scherp tarief.

Bij WMS Chauffeursdiensten draait alles om uw gemak, productiviteit en tevredenheid. Met onze toonaangevende WMS-chauffeursdiensten profiteert u van talloze voordelen:

 Betrouwbaarheid en Veiligheid: Onze WMS-chauffeurs zijn deskundig en ervaren. U kunt volledig vertrouwen op hoogwaardige en veilige transportoplossingen. Uw veiligheid is onze hoogste prioriteit.

 Tijdsbesparing en Efficiëntie: Terwijl u rustig doorwerkt, zorgen wij voor het rijden. Geen verspilde reistijd meer! Dankzij onze chauffeursdiensten wordt uw reistijd effectieve werktijd, waardoor u uw kostbare tijd optimaal kunt benutten. Bovendien hoeft u nooit meer zelf te parkeren of uw elektrische auto op te laden, waardoor u nog meer tijd bespaart.

 Maatwerkoplossingen: Bij WMS begrijpen we dat elk bedrijf uniek is. Daarom bieden we op maat gemaakte oplossingen die naadloos aansluiten bij uw specifieke vereisten. Of het nu gaat om routes, planning of transportcapaciteit, wij bieden flexibiliteit om uw logistieke processen te stroomlijnen.

Name: Jacobs Autocars
Description:
De klant staat centraal bij Jacobs Autocars! Onze persoonlijke aanpak zorgt ervoor dat je bij ons geen nummer bent. Francis Paulussen, verantwoordelijke voor de autocars, garandeert die aanpak.

Het begint al bij de offerteaanvraag. Binnen de 24 uur na aanvraag ontvang je een vrijblijvende offerte gebaseerd op jouw noden.
Tijdens de reis geniet je ook van de voordelen van onze persoonlijke aanpak. Onze chauffeurs begroeten je vriendelijk bij het betreden van de autocar.
Vervolgens neem je plaats en kan je ontspannen en zorgeloos genieten van de reis.

Daarbovenop staat Francis in permanent contact met de chauffeur en/of het hotel om dadelijk op onverwachte situaties in te inspelen. Verder gaat ook continu de nodige aandacht naar veiligheid.

Wij stellen immers zeer hoge eisen betreffende de naleving van de rij- en rusttijden. Daarnaast controleren onze garagisten al onze autocars voor en na een rit grondig & doen ze een interventie wanneer nodig.

Tot slot ziet Francis er ook scherp op toe dat de afhandeling nadien op een vlotte en correcte manier verloopt.

Onze persoonlijke aanpak werkt, want sommige klanten kiezen al meer dan 30 jaar voor Jacobs Autocars.

Stéphane Marcon, fils de Jean, reprend la direction de STE en 2008, toujours avec les mêmes convictions :

Name: Taxi Hendriks nv
Description:
At Hendriks, we are proud to be a family-owned company with a strong tradition in care transport across Flanders, Brussels, and Wallonia. Every day, our team of 770 dedicated professionals works with one clear mission: to provide safe, reliable, and people-friendly mobility solutions.

We believe that transport should be both customer-centered and environmentally conscious, ensuring that every journey makes a positive difference. By focusing on quality, trust, and safety, we support better mobility for persons with reduced mobility, wheelchair users, and anyone facing mobility challenges. Our strength lies in partnerships – with public services, organizations, and individuals – all working together to create accessible and sustainable transport for everyone.

But Hendriks goes far beyond wheelchair transport (PRM). We are also active in a wide range of specialized niches of assistance and mobility. For example, we provide crew transport between Brussels Airport (Zaventem) and various hotels, as well as within the airport grounds itself.

Under the name IHcT, and in close collaboration with Red Cross Flanders, we ensure the daily distribution of blood supplies to all Flemish hospitals. We also manage nuclear transports on behalf of UZ Gasthuisberg, reflecting our commitment to safety and precision in highly sensitive operations.

In addition, our dedicated team delivers PRM Assistance at Brussels Airport, offering guidance and support to passengers with reduced mobility both in the terminals and across the airport grounds. Both IHcT and PRM Assistance operate 24/7, every day of the year, ensuring continuous and reliable service.

And since 2024, Hendriks has proudly taken on an important new role: providing ‘De Lijn Flex’ on-demand public transport across multiple regions in Flanders. With this, we bring accessible and flexible mobility even closer to the people who need it most.
Primary Industry: Shuttles and Special Needs Transportation Services

Name: Access Services
Description:
Access Services, a local public entity, is the Los Angeles County Consolidated
Transportation Services Agency (“CTSA”) and administers the Los Angeles County
Coordinated Paratransit Plan (“Plan”) on behalf of the County’s 45 public fixed route operators (i.e., bus and rail). Pursuant to the Plan, Access facilitates the provision of complementary ADA paratransit services to certain persons with disabilities as required by 42 U.S.C. §12143 under the name “Access Paratransit.” Paratransit is an alternative mode of flexible passenger transportation that does not follow fixed routes or schedules. Typically, vans or mini-buses are used to provide paratransit service, but shared taxis are also important providers as a form of transportation. Complementary ADA paratransit is a federally mandated civil right for persons with disabilities cannot ride the accessible public fixed route buses and trains.

As one of the largest Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) paratransit programs in the United States.  Access has an annual capital and operating budget in excess of $170 million.  In FY 18, Access Services provided more than 4.6 million rides and currently has over 160,000 eligible riders in Los Angeles County.  Complementary ADA paratransit is a federally mandated civil right for persons with disabilities who cannot ride the accessible public fixed route buses and trains.  

Mission:
Access Services promotes access to all modes of transportation and provides quality and safe ADA paratransit service on behalf of public transit agencies in Los Angeles County.

Tecrübelerine her geçen gün yenilerini ekleyerek, modern araç filosu, eğitimli kadrosu ve güçlü finansal/teknolojik alt yapısı ile ülkemizin önde gelen kamu ve özel kurumlarına turizm taşımacılığının yanı sıra personel taşıma ve araç kiralama hizmetleri sunmaktadır.

Efatur'un öncelikli hedefi; kaliteli ve güvenilir hizmet anlayışı, profesyonel kadrosu ve sektör tecrübesi ile müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarını en doğru biçimde karşılamak ve sektördeki öncü kimliğini korumaktır. Finansal yapısı, sürekli büyüyen hizmet ağı ve yenilenen geniş araç filosuyla hizmet verdiği kurumların ihtiyaç duyduğu her noktada stratejik çözüm ortağı olmaya devam etmektedir. Bunlar arasında uzun dönem binek araç ve iş makineleri kiralama, 24 saat takip ve taşıma gerektiren havayolları uçuş ekiplerinin transferlerini güvenle yerine getirmeyi sayabiliriz. 

Kurulduğu günden bu yana müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı hizmet anlayışıyla; sunduğu hizmetlerde kalite standartlarına uygunluk ilkesini prensip edinen EFATUR, aralıksız uygulanan iç ve dış denetimleri başarıyla geçmekte, teknolojik yenilikleri hizmetlerine uyarlayarak taşıma sektöründe öncü olmaya devam etmekte ve bugün tüm Türkiye genelinde hizmet vermenin haklı gururunu yaşamaktadır.

Name: Airport Link South Africa
Description:
Airport Link has been providing a pre-booked, private, door-to-door and chauffeur service since 1992. We transport passengers in and out of airports, from meetings, dinners and sports events in Johannesburg, Cape Town and Durban. 

We are associated with some of the biggest companies in South Africa because we provide an efficient and reliable service, that gives peace of mind to both the company making the booking and the client travelling.

Airport Link’s drivers all carry Public Drivers Permits that are valid for 2 years. To renew a Permit the driver must get a Police Clearance, must get a full medical check- up with a General Practitioner and do an eye test.

Our drivers are experienced, familiar with roads, routes and are alert to the current trends in hijacking.
The vehicles are monitored 24 hours per day by the “Tracker – TomTom” system. At our control room the controller can see the movement of all vehicles all the time. 

Airport Link currently runs 7 seater minibuses and sedans, as well as a 16 seater Mercedes Sprinter. We provide car seats and booster seats for the family when required and trailers for the bigger loads for which there are no extra charges.

All vehicles are kept for a maximum of two and a half years, and are subjected to a Certificate of Fitness, a roadworthy test every year. Vehicles are insured comprehensively and Passenger Liability insurance is in place to cover passengers in case of negligence on our behalf.

Airport Link has vast experience in the business of transporting passengers. We have evolved into one of the most trusted and reliable companies in our field. This business is growing, and the growth is as a result of customer satisfaction.

Personel taşımacılığı; titizlik, ciddiyet ve sorumluluk gerektiren bir iştir. Bunun bilinciyle hareket ederek görevimizi en iyi şekilde yerine getirmeye özen gösteriyor, müşterilerimize hatasız hizmet sunmayı taahhüt ediyoruz.
Günümüzün yoğun ve zorlu trafik koşullarında, çalışanları sabah iş yerlerine, akşam evlerine güvenli ve zamanında ulaştırmanın öneminin farkındayız. Bu konudaki hassasiyetimiz, hizmet verdiğimiz firmalar tarafından da takdir edilmektedir.
Muyab Turizm olarak, hem kendi araç filomuzda hem de çözüm ortaklarımızın araçlarında gerekli tüm standartların eksiksiz yerine getirildiğini garanti ederiz. Araç şoförlerimizde cep telefonu bulunması, şirketimizin belirlediği kılık-kıyafet ve kişisel bakım standartlarının titizlikle uygulanması, temizlik ve eğitim konularında disiplinin sağlanması önceliklerimiz arasındadır.
Çalıştırdığımız tüm araçların kasko, koltuk sigortası, trafik sigortası, yol izin belgeleri ve teknik bakımlarının tam ve güncel olmasına büyük özen gösteriyoruz. Ayrıca, birlikte çalıştığımız firmalardan gelecek her türlü talep ve öneriyi dikkatle değerlendirerek yerine getirmeyi görev biliyoruz.
Kurulduğumuz günden bu yana kaliteli, güvenilir ve müşteri memnuniyetine odaklı bir hizmet anlayışını benimsiyor, güler yüzlü kadromuzla siz değerli iş ortaklarımıza hizmet vermekten mutluluk duyuyoruz.

Name: Bourne Community Bus
Description:
The Bourne Community Bus provides FREE resident travel.

We have two 16 seat minibuses with easy disabled lift access, so you can just turn up at one of 20 stops and get on and then get off where you want.

The bus runs every Tuesday, Thursday and Friday 8:30 – 18:00 around local villages and uses safe pick up and drop-off points for passengers.

The minibus is for local residents of all ages, regardless of physical ability. It offers essential transport links for those living off main train and bus routes, giving easy access to local shops, social activities, health centres and Bourne Community College for after-school activities.

Thorney Island Baker Barracks, Chidham and Hambrook, Southbourne and Westbourne Parishes and Emsworth Resident’s Association have come together to offer this new community minibus, run and managed by the Southbourne Community Land Trust.

For Bourne Parish residents: Eight 60 to 80 minute circuits per day around Southbourne, Nutbourne, Hambrook, Westbourne and Emsworth on a Tuesday, Thursday and Friday. The bus provides resident travel to shops and social centres in Havant, Emsworth and Chichester and easy access to doctors and dentists and links with rail stations and A259 bus routes.

For Thorney Island residents: shopping trips to Havant, Emsworth and Chichester on Tuesday, Thursday and Friday and Havant train station on Friday afternoon for weekends visiting friends and family. Return 15:45 transport for children at Bourne Community College after an hour of after-school activities on Tuesdays, Thursdays and Fridays, plus one-way transport on a Thursday for evenings out in Havant, Chichester or Portsmouth.

Name: Rockbridge Area Transportation System, Inc
Description:
Rockbridge Area Transportation System (RATS) provides transportation for senior citizens, individuals with disabilities, and community residents with limited access to transportation services. Founded in 1995 by Joan Manley after she was paralyzed by a drunk driver, RATS is the only door-to-door transportation provider based in Rockbridge County and currently serves residents in the western Shenandoah Valley.  
Founded by RATS and Carilion Rockbridge Community Hospital in 2022, the Rockbridge Connect And Nourish (CAN) Initiative was developed to address limited access to services, food insecurity, and social isolation in rural areas throughout Rockbridge County, and includes a coalition of 14 community service organizations to develop a safety net for rural residents with limited access to services. The Initiative provides transportation services for area residents to and from 3-course catered meals prepared by local restaurants and caterers, served in multiple rural areas of the county, and at no-cost to all diners. In addition, community service organizations volunteer at the meals to both serve meals and connect diners with information and resources to improve access to services in disadvantaged and rural areas.  
Between March 2023 and December 2023, Rockbridge CAN served almost 2,000 meals, provided more than 500 rides across 6,000 miles, and was supported by more than 70 volunteers, 10 local businesses, and pilot grants from local, state, and national organizations and agencies.
RATS also provides transportation services for residents in Alleghany County, and Rockbridge CAN is exploring opportunities to expand resources in the area, too.
Primary Industry: Shuttles and Special Needs Transportation Services

Name: HANDIMOB
Description:
HANDIMOB est une société en phase de création, consacrée au transport routier adapté des personnes en situation de handicap, à mobilité réduite ou en perte d'autonomie.

Notre conviction : faciliter la mobilité des publics les plus fragiles est un ressort essentiel de leur inclusion au sein de la société.

Notre objectif principal : la recherche d'une utilité sociale, que nous avons déclinée dans nos statuts selon trois axes :
- participer à l’inclusion sociale, économique, culturelle et de loisirs des personnes à mobilité réduite et plus généralement en situation de handicap, ou en perte d'autonomie, en contribuant à la réduction des inégalités d’accès les impactant,
- proposer des solutions de mobilité innovantes et inclusives,
- participer à la préservation et au développement du lien social des personnes à mobilité réduite et plus généralement en situation de handicap ou en perte d'autonomie et ainsi contribuer au renforcement de la solidarité et de la cohésion territoriale.


HANDIMOB n’a donc pas été conçu comme un transporteur classique, mais également comme un vecteur d’innovation sociale, avec l’ambition de créer de nouvelles solutions de mobilité pour ceux qui en sont le plus privés. Cette approche innovante nous a permis d'intégrer en 2025 Alter'Incub Occitanie Méditerranée, le premier incubateur régional de l'Economie Sociale et Solidaire, qui accompagne depuis 2007 les entreprises engagées dont l'objectif est de répondre à un besoin social et/ou environnemental non couvert.

Notre ambition, nous souhaitons la partager avec les acteurs de notre territoire, institutionnels ou privés, acteurs locaux du handicap ou du vieillissement, mais pas uniquement. Car l’inclusion de ces publics passe par l’accès à tous les domaines de la sphère sociale : éducation, travail, soins, culture, loisirs, tourisme...


Ce sont ces différents domaines que nous souhaitons investir pour positionner HANDIMOB comme "créateur de mobilité".

Name: Aero Transportation
Description:
Aero Transportation is a premier Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT) provider based in Niagara Falls, New York, known for its safe, punctual, and compassionate service. Founded by Nazreen “Naz” Akhtar (CEO) and Anas Mangla (Vice President and Director of Operations), Aero began as a family-driven venture with a simple goal: to bridge gaps in healthcare access across Western New York. Today, the company has grown into a trusted community partner, offering wheelchair-accessible vehicles, attentive drivers, and end-to-end support for individuals who need reliable rides to medical appointments, rehabilitation sessions, and more.

Located at 6951 Williams Road, Aero Transportation is dedicated to meeting the unique needs of seniors, patients with mobility challenges, and anyone requiring additional assistance. With Ray Ahmad (Naz’s brother) overseeing daily operations, the entire team prides itself on ensuring passengers feel safe, respected, and well cared for—from door to door. Whether it’s coordinating schedules with clinics or providing a comforting hand during pick-up, Aero goes above and beyond to deliver outstanding service tailored to every rider’s situation.

Beyond transportation, Aero actively partners with local businesses and nonprofit organizations to bolster community outreach. Notably, through collaborative efforts with Bridge Niagara Foundation, they’ve helped organize a Turkey Giveaway, ensuring families in need can enjoy holiday meals. This blend of professional service and heartfelt engagement has positioned Aero Transportation as more than just a ride provider: it’s a pillar in the Western New York community, uniting people and resources for a healthier, more inclusive future.

To learn more, visit aero716.com and discover how Aero Transportation continues to innovate and expand access to essential services for all.

Name: MyBlaBlaJet
Description:
About Us: The Legacy of Pacote and the Birth of MyBlaBlaJet

At ihodei.com, inspiration can come from the most unexpected places. Our journey to create MyBlaBlaJet, a collaborative platform for sharing private jet flights, was deeply influenced by a stray cat named Pacote. Found alone and limping on the streets of Murcia, Pacote was brought into our lives and quickly became a symbol of perseverance and hope.

Despite his difficult past, Pacote’s unwavering spirit inspired our team to dream big and push forward, even in the face of challenges. His presence in our office reminded us daily that great ideas often come from the heart, and with patience and dedication, those ideas can take flight.

Pacote became more than just a companion; he was the first believer in MyBlaBlaJet, and in our hearts, he was also its first user. Though his time with us was short, his legacy lives on in the vision and ambition of our project. Today, MyBlaBlaJet stands as a testament to the power of inspiration, born from the bond between a small cat and a team with big dreams.

As we continue to develop and grow MyBlaBlaJet, we carry Pacote’s spirit with us, ensuring that his influence is felt in every step we take. MyBlaBlaJet is more than just a platform; it’s a journey fueled by the memory of Pacote, guiding us towards a future full of possibilities.

Name: AstraCare Transport
Description:
At AstraCare Transport, we deliver care-focused logistics with integrity, precision, and compassion. Trusted by the State of Arizona and communities across the Valley, we provide essential transportation and delivery services that support health, safety, and well-being at every turn.

Our foundation is built on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT)—offering safe, punctual, and respectful rides for individuals who rely on consistent access to medical appointments, treatments, and therapies. We’re proud to serve as an extension of the healthcare system, ensuring patients reach their destinations with dignity and peace of mind.

Expanding beyond NEMT, AstraCare plays a vital role in supporting Child Protective Services by providing secure, confidential, and compassionate transportation for vulnerable children and families. Our specialized team understands the sensitivity of these cases and handles every ride with professionalism and care.

We also operate a growing Durable Medical Equipment (DME) logistics division, ensuring timely and accurate delivery of critical medical supplies directly to patients’ homes—bridging the gap between clinical care and comfort at home.

At every level, our operations are guided by integrity, reliability, and a relentless commitment to service excellence. With a trained team, modern fleet, and advanced logistics coordination, AstraCare is proud to be a trusted partner in the healthcare support network.

We don’t just transport people and products—we carry trust, deliver comfort, and uphold the highest standards of care.

Driving Care, Delivering Comfort.

Description:
Oto Track - Solusi Rental Mobil Terpercaya di Karawang dan Bekasi

Selamat datang di halaman LinkedIn resmi Oto Track! Kami adalah penyedia layanan rental mobil terkemuka berbasis di Karawang dengan cabang di Bekasi, di bawah naungan CV. Sekawan Putra Sejahtera. Visi Kami:
Menjadi penyedia jasa rental mobil terdepan di Karawang dan Bekasi, dikenal atas keandalan dan kualitas layanan kami. Kami selalu berupaya meningkatkan standar layanan, menjadikan setiap perjalanan bersama Oto Track aman, nyaman, dan menyenangkan.

Misi Kami:

Menawarkan berbagai pilihan kendaraan yang selalu terawat dan siap pakai.

Sedan: Ideal untuk perjalanan bisnis atau keluarga kecil.
SUV: Pilihan tepat untuk perjalanan di berbagai medan atau keluarga yang membutuhkan lebih banyak ruang.
Minivan: Cocok untuk kelompok besar atau perjalanan keluarga.
City Car: Efisien dan ekonomis untuk berkeliling kota.
Pickup Trucks: Untuk keperluan logistik atau pengangkutan barang.
Keunggulan Kami

Variasi Kendaraan: Pilihan kendaraan yang luas, sesuai dengan kebutuhan dan anggaran Anda.
Proses Pemesanan Mudah: Pesan kendaraan dengan mudah dan cepat melalui website atau WhatsApp.
Tarif Kompetitif: Tarif yang transparan dan kompetitif, tanpa biaya tersembunyi.
Dukungan Pelanggan 24/7: Layanan pelanggan siap membantu Anda kapan saja.
Tim Profesional Kami
Tim kami terdiri dari profesional yang berpengalaman dan berdedikasi. Kami siap membantu Anda memilih kendaraan yang sesuai dengan kebutuhan dan menjawab segala pertanyaan seputar layanan kami. Kepuasan pelanggan adalah prioritas utama kami.

Name: Diplomatic Shuttle Service
Description:
Diplomatic Shuttle Service (DSS) was established in 2002 to support diplomatic missions by providing security screening and controlled shuttle transportation for visa applicants within sensitive diplomatic zones.

DSS operated as a centralized facilitation and transport system, managing applicant movement between a designated compound and embassies/high commissions located within the Diplomatic Enclave.

Historically serving 32 embassies and high commissions, DSS played a key role in reducing security risks, managing access control, and ensuring disciplined, protocol-based movement of applicants.

The operation included pre-entry screening, access management, escorted shuttle transport, and structured applicant handling, developed on an airport-style facilitation model.

DSS remains recognized for its contribution to security coordination, operational discipline, and institutional-level transport services.

 Services
	•	Visa Applicant Security Screening
	•	Controlled Shuttle Transport (Compound ⇄ Embassies ⇄ Return)
	•	Access Control & Visitor Flow Management
	•	Diplomatic & Delegation Transport Coordination
